properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I will never forget the moment I met you The moment you called my name Pulled me out of the darkness gave me a promise To never thirst again

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: All that I ever wanted My heart has found in you I have tasted life Nothing satisfies like you do The fount that won't run dry Nothing satisfies like you do

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I want all that You offer Your living water Drink from the endless well I will sit at your table forever grateful Forever where You plan

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: All my fountains are in you All my hope is built on your love All my fountains are in you With every breath I live for you, Lord
